news.headline: Worldshards unveils full in-game economy, offers pre-TGE airdrops to all active players. #gaming #blockchain
Sandals Resorts launches "Made of Caribbean" campaign globally, in partnership with Leo Burnett.
news.summary: Sandals Resorts unveils its inaugural campaign "Made of Caribbean" in partnership with Leo Burnett in Montego Bay, Jamaica on December 19, 2024. The campaign aims to highlight the essence of the Caribbean and showcase it worldwide through a comprehensive multi-media approach. Sandals Resorts is set to elevate the region's cultural spirit, with the campaign expected to reach a vast audience through diverse platforms. This initiative marks a significant milestone for the company as it embraces the soul of the Caribbean and promotes its unique identity on a global scale.

news.headline: Iceland Seafood International hf: Transaction on 19.12.2024.
Dow Jones up 450 points on strong GDP, jobless claims; Micron drops.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones saw a remarkable rebound of 450 points driven by positive GDP and weekly unemployment figures. However, AI chip leader Micron experienced a significant decline in earnings. The surprising GDP results along with favorable jobless claims contributed to the strong performance of the Dow Jones. Conversely, Micron's plunge following their earnings report contrasted the overall positive trend in the market.

news.headline: Dow Jones, S&P 500 rebound after 1,100 pt drop. Micron sinks, Nvidia climbs on earnings reports.
news.summary: Following a significant sell-off, the Dow Jones and S&P 500 are making efforts to bounce back. Micron experienced a decline following its earnings report, whereas Nvidia saw an increase. The Dow Jones is attempting to recover from a 1,100 point drop, with Micron sinking due to earnings results and Nvidia rebounding.

news.headline: Gyrotrons market to grow at 5.1% CAGR, expected to reach USD 637 million by 2030. Advancing energy, manufacturing, defense.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, on December 19, 2024, it was reported that the Gyrotrons Market is divided into types such as Positive Ions Type and Negative Ions Type, with applications in hospitals and institutes. The market was valued at USD 450 million in 2023, with projections indicating growth to USD 637 million by 2030.

news.headline: Alchemy Pay registers under Visa's Ramp Provider Program, a significant milestone achieved through partnership with Worldpay.Characters: 109
news.summary: In Singapore on December 19, 2024, Alchemy Pay, a premier fiat-payment gateway, reached a noteworthy achievement by being officially registered under Visa's latest Ramp Provider Program. This milestone was made possible through a collaboration with Worldpay as previously disclosed.

news.headline: Elanco (NYSE: ELAN) to attend 43rd J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 14, 2025 with CEO Jeff Simmons.
news.summary: Elanco Animal Health Incorporated (NYSE: ELAN) based in Greenfield, Indiana, has announced its participation in the upcoming 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference scheduled for January 14, 2025. Jeff Simmons, the President and CEO of the company, will be representing Elanco at the conference and will be available to address queries from attendees. This conference holds significance in the healthcare sector and provides a platform for key industry players to discuss trends, innovations, and future strategies.

news.headline: Mattamy Homes to build 73 homes in Blackhawk community in Tucson, Arizona after purchasing 73 lots for $7.3M.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona on December 19, 2024, Mattamy Homes, the top privately owned homebuilder in North America, acquired 73 completed lots in the Blackhawk community located southwest of Interstate-10 and Wilmot Road. The purchase, finalized on December 18, amounted to $7.3 million.

news.headline: Equities fear limited to near term as volatility futures indicate, according to Bloomberg.
3M and US Conec collaborate on expanded beam optical technology for data centers; strategic licensing agreement announced.
news.summary: A recent licensing agreement has been forged between 3M and US Conec Ltd., merging 3M's cutting-edge optical advancements with US Conec's proficiency in high-density connectivity solutions. This significant partnership, announced on December 19, 2024, in St. Paul, Minnesota, marks a strategic move aimed at enhancing next-generation networks. The agreement is set to pave the way for collaborative innovations that leverage the strengths of both companies.

news.headline: Orthopaedic surgeons provide tips to prevent winter bone and joint injuries as harsh conditions catch people off guard.
news.summary: In Rosemont, Illinois on December 19, 2024, Orthopaedic surgeons provided six tips on how to safely navigate the cold weather. As winter conditions can cause unexpected dangers, it is essential to be prepared. Slippery surfaces and icy conditions can result in injuries, with statistics showing a significant increase in accidents during this time of year. By following the experts' advice, individuals can minimize the risk of harm while still enjoying the winter season.

news.headline: November sees increase in new listings and inventory for Florida's housing market, with statewide median sales prices easing.
news.summary: In December of 2024, the housing market in Orlando, Florida reported an increase in new listings and active inventory levels compared to the previous year. Median sales prices across the state continued to decline, as per the most recent housing data from Florida Realtors®. The market saw a notable rise in new listings, leading to higher inventory numbers. Meanwhile, median sales prices showed a consistent decrease over the same period.

news.headline: Belka Games donates $100,000 to Make-A-Wish and launches a holiday event in support, helping children with critical illnesses.
news.summary: In LIMASSOL, Cyprus, Clockmaker is hosting a unique event to aid Make-A-Wish in granting life-changing wishes for youngsters with critical illnesses. Participants can take part by accomplishing levels and unlocking fresh destinations, allowing them to reflect on their childhood aspirations and contribute to the realization of wishes for struggling children. Players engage in a quest alongside Mark the traveler, but their expedition faces an unexpected halt with the appearance of a mysterious portal. Join this event to support Make-A-Wish and contribute to bringing joy to kids in need.

news.headline: Wave Digital Assets expands globally with launch of Wave International in British Virgin Islands, approved by its financial services commission.
news.summary: In a recent development, Wave Digital Assets Holdings LLC (Wave) has expanded globally by introducing Wave Digital Assets International Ltd. (Wave International). This new entity has been approved as an "Approved Manager" by the British Virgin Islands Financial Services Commission, operating under the British Virgin Islands Investment Business (Approved Managers) Regulations, 2012. To facilitate its expansion on an international scale, Wave International has onboarded a skilled trading team from Mercury Capital.

news.headline: Tri Pointe Homes debuts Twinleaf Townes, 102-townhome community in Raleigh with interiors by Bobby Berk, focusing on personal style.
news.summary: Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. (NYSE: TPH), a leading homebuilder, recently unveiled Twinleaf Townes in Raleigh, NC, marking the premiere of Bobby Berk-designed residences in the Triangle area. This 102-townhome community showcases interiors tailored to reflect personal style preferences. The project signifies a significant move for Tri Pointe Homes as they venture into a new market segment. Twinleaf Townes provides an opportunity for residents to experience Berk's signature design aesthetic within their homes.

news.headline: Accomplish Health and ATA partner for comprehensive medical weight loss and mental health services for patients with obesity in NYC, Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 19, 2024, Accomplish Health, known for their evidence-based medical weight loss and obesity treatment solutions, has formed a strategic partnership with Assessment & Therapy Associates (ATA), a top provider of mental health services. This collaboration aims to improve care for individuals seeking assistance in managing their health. Both companies bring valuable expertise in their respective fields to address the growing concerns surrounding weight management and mental health.

news.headline: Onego Bio submits GRAS notification to FDA for Bioalbumen®, a non-animal ovalbumin, produced through precision fermentation.
news.summary: A Finnish-U.S. food ingredient company, Onego Bio, based in San Diego, has submitted its Generally Recognized as Safe (GRAS) notification to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for its non-animal ovalbumin, known as Bioalbumen®. This product is produced through precision fermentation with Trichoderma reesei. If approved, this will be the first non-animal egg protein with an amino acid sequence identical to the natural protein. This significant development represents a crucial advancement in the global food industry.

news.headline: Yuzawaya, Japan's largest specialty store for handcrafts, opens online store for global purchases. Established 70 years ago.
news.summary: Tokyo - Yuzawaya Shoji Corporation, a leading retail store in Japan specializing in handcrafts, fabrics, and hobby materials, was founded 70 years ago. The store is situated in Ota-ku, Tokyo, and is overseen by Chairman Nobumoto Hatanaka. Recently, the company launched an online store that now takes orders from customers worldwide. Yuzawaya is known for its wide range of supplies such as fabrics, yarns, embroidery tools, traditional Japanese paper, and clay.

news.headline: Allied Gold receives $75 million gold prepay arrangement and first payment under streaming agreement with Wheaton Precious Metals.
news.summary: Toronto-based Allied Gold Corporation (TSX: AAUC) (OTCQX: AAUCF) has disclosed receiving the initial construction payment as part of its US$175 million streaming deal with Wheaton Precious Metals. The agreement was announced earlier, highlighting significant financial involvement.

news.headline: Infor recognized as leader in IDC MarketScape for Worldwide Manufacturing Execution Systems, offering extensive configurability.
news.summary: In a recent press release on December 19, 2024, Infor was highlighted for its impressive level of configurability in manufacturing solutions. The company offers a wide range of configuration options, including process type and industry-specific functionalities, for discrete, process, batch, and assembly manufacturing. This recognition solidifies Infor's position as a leader in the industry, showcasing its ability to cater to the diverse needs of manufacturers.

news.headline: Quantiphi partners with AWS in Generative AI alliance, one of nine global partners, to boost innovation.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Marlborough, Massachusetts, Quantiphi, a digital engineering company focused on AI technologies, was selected as one of nine global partners to participate in the Generative AI Partner Innovation Alliance recently established by Amazon Web Services (AWS), a subsidiary of Amazon.com, Inc. This alliance aims to foster innovation and drive growth in the field of generative artificial intelligence.

news.headline: "DAN DA DAN anime set to return for season 2 in July 2025 per Mainichi Broadcasting System Inc."
news.summary: A popular anime series, DAN DA DAN, has been confirmed for a comeback by Mainichi Broadcasting System Inc. The show, considered an occult classic, is set to return with its second season in July 2025. Known for its exceptional quality, DAN DA DAN has garnered acclaim as one of the top anime series in recent times.

news.headline: INTIMINA introduces eco-friendly Bloom Period Underwear for women, aiming to revolutionize period care.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in New York, it is acknowledged that menstrual cycles can be inconvenient when managing daily responsibilities like work or school. The concerns of leaks and frequent bathroom trips can disrupt productivity. This issue affects a significant portion of the population, creating challenges for individuals trying to balance various aspects of their lives.

news.headline: TMA Automotive Software Center in Vietnam launches new solutions for Software-Defined Vehicles after years of investment.
news.summary: In Vietnam's Ho Chi Minh City on December 19, 2024, the TMA Automotive Software Center announced the completion of a series of new solutions aimed at advancing Software-Defined Vehicles after investing significantly in research and development. These solutions encompass various aspects such as R&D prototyping, embedded software, and more. This marks a significant milestone for the center after years of dedicated investment.

news.headline: Jack Henry's Symitar platform solidifies as top choice for credit unions, according to Callahan & Associates. Market gains and sustained leadership noted in annual report. #CreditUnions #JackHenry #Symitar
news.summary: In its latest annual report, leading data and consulting firm in the credit union industry, Callahan & Associates, based in Monett, Missouri, announced significant market gains and continued leadership in the industry. The report, released on December 19, 2024, showcased the success of Jack Henry's Symitar platform, confirming its position as the top choice within the industry for credit unions. This news highlights the strength of the industry as it continues to expand and innovate.

news.headline: NRMP launches "NRMP State Snapshots" providing state-level Match outcomes info to applicants. Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 19, 2024, the National Resident Matching Program® (NRMP®) introduced a new tool known as "NRMP State Snapshots." This resource aims to offer a comprehensive summary of Match outcomes data specific to each state. With this tool, individuals can access valuable insights regarding the purpose and extent of the matching program in their respective states. By providing details on matching outcomes at the state-level, the NRMP® seeks to enhance transparency and understanding within the program. This initiative can be instrumental in facilitating informed decision-making for participants.

news.headline: Luxury brokerage Briggs Freeman Sotheby's International Realty opens new office in Southlake, Texas, a key city in the future third-largest U.S. metro area.
news.summary: A new office for the expert advisors of the leading luxury brokerage in North Texas, Briggs Freeman Sotheby's International Realty, has been revealed in Southlake, Texas. The new location will cater to clients in Southlake and the surrounding areas. This move signifies the company's commitment to serving the affluent market in the region.

news.headline: FloWater launches 'Always Unwrapped' campaign in Atlanta with billboard challenging 'Big Beverage' to 'Unwrap' water.
news.summary: A campaign launched by Denver's FloWater in Atlanta features a bold billboard challenging "Big Beverage" and consumers to "unwrap" their water. The billboard boasts cheeky headlines and bold visuals outside a major beverage company in December 2024. This initiative aims to raise awareness about the importance of choosing sustainable beverage options. The campaign seeks to prompt a discussion about the impact of beverage choices and encourage consumers to think about their water consumption.

news.headline: Plug and Play partners with Huntington Bank in Fintech Program, fostering innovation across industries. #Collaboration #Innovation #Fintech
news.summary: A partnership between Plug and Play, a worldwide innovation platform linking startups, companies, and investors to drive innovation in various sectors, and The Huntington National Bank, a prominent regional bank, has been declared. The collaboration comes as Plug and Play continues its commitment to fostering innovation. The Huntington National Bank, recognized for its strong regional presence, aims to leverage this partnership to enhance its innovation efforts. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024, in Sunnyvale, California, marking a significant development in the collaboration between the two entities.

news.headline: Global smoke evacuation systems market valued at US$175.5 million in 2023 is set to hit US$266.4 million by 2029 with a 7.3% CAGR.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of December 19, 2024, the worldwide smoke evacuation systems market was worth US$175.5 million in 2023. It is anticipated to exhibit strong growth with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.3%, projected to hit US$187.6 million in 2024, and a substantial US$266.4 billion by 2029. The market's performance has been...

news.headline: US to sell $81 bln 3-month bills on December 23rd, to settle on December 26th.
US to sell $72 bln 6-month bills on December 23rd, to settle on December 26th.
US to sell $48 bln 52-week bills on December 23rd, to settle on December 26th.
MPR elevates Pete Carlone to Vice President, overseeing US nuclear power plant services, effective January 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Va., MPR Associates, Inc. has announced the promotion of Pete Carlone to Vice President. Starting on January 1, 2025, Mr. Carlone will take on the role of Vice President overseeing MPR's operations within the US nuclear power plant industry. In his new position, he will be tasked with collaborating with clients to provide services and solutions aimed at improving the performance of the American nuclear power plant operating sector, which plays a crucial role in meeting the country's energy needs.

news.headline: Corvias completes significant upgrades at Fort Johnson, supporting military readiness and quality of life.
news.summary: In Fort Johnson, Louisiana, Corvias recently completed a series of important upgrades to support military readiness and improve the quality of life for service members and their families. These enhancements demonstrate a commitment to bettering facilities, maintaining readiness, and fostering a safe and supportive community environment. Over the last two years, Corvias has invested significantly in these improvements.

news.headline: Cerberus buys Landmark Structures, North America's top water storage provider, known for its services since 1974.
news.summary: Cerberus Capital Management, L.P., a prominent alternative investment firm, has recently completed the acquisition of Landmark Structures, a reputable company known for offering comprehensive water storage solutions in North America. Established in 1974, Landmark specializes in providing engineering, construction, installation, and maintenance services for water and industrial storage tanks. This acquisition further strengthens Cerberus' position in the industry and signifies their commitment to expanding their presence in this sector.

news.headline: US to sell $70 bln 5-year notes on December 24th, to settle on December 31st.
US to sell $44 bln 7-year notes on December 26th, to settle on December 31st.
Dave & Buster’s rehires Steve Klohn as Chief Information Officer after 8 years; he left after joining Main Event.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 19, 2024, Dave & Buster's Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: PLAY), a company that owns and operates entertainment and dining venues, shared the return of Steve Klohn as Chief Information Officer. Klohn is rejoining the company after departing earlier in the year, having previously spent a total of 8 years with Main Event and Dave & Buster’s.

news.headline: Gold Bull CEO focuses on mergers and acquisitions due to weak sector sentiment. Focus on generating cash flow for Sandman asset in Nevada.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, news broke on Dec 19, 2024, highlighting a significant year for Gold Bull. Despite a robust gold price, the junior resource sector has showcased a lackluster sentiment leading to challenges in obtaining capital without dilution. Consequently, Gold Bull strategically engaged in thorough due diligence of multiple firms throughout the year, exploring possibilities for mergers or acquisitions. The primary focus was on assessing companies with the potential to generate cash flow, aiming to utilize this capital to propel the development of Gold Bull’s Sandman asset in Nevada towards imminent production.

news.headline: Kansas City Fed Manufacturing Actual -5 (Forecast -, Previous -4)
Latest Bloomberg Surveillance show talks about Federal Reserve decisions and political issues.
Bitcoin rebounds over $102,000 post-Fed meeting; US GDP hits 3.1%, jobless claims drop, Tesla's EU registrations fall 41%.
news.summary: A Shiba Inu whale made a $109 million profit after holding since 2020, while questions arise on why the SHIB price is falling. VanEck CEO believes stablecoins could redefine global finance with banks potentially falling behind. Bitcoin price bounced back above $102,000 after the Federal Reserve meeting, possibly due to market reactions. Criticisms on Bitcoin reserves calling US solvency into question were met with dismissive responses. Despite Fed restrictions, Bitcoin ETFs rise in pre-market trading. Crypto wallet provider Exodus debuted on Wall Street with shares popping 37%. Germany's largest bank is reportedly using an Ethereum-based blockchain solution to overcome regulatory hurdles.In the US markets, stocks are expected to open higher after a plunge caused by Powell's hawkish comments, with the Dow falling over 1,100 points and entering a 10th consecutive session decline as the Greed Index moves to the 'fear' zone. Trump’s rejection of a bipartisan deal is fueling government shutdown fears. In world politics, the Russian President expresses willingness to meet Trump for dialogue, while China accuses the US of cyber espionage amid rising tensions.US GDP has been revised to an undisclosed figure. These stories and more are available on Benzinga.com, with varying issues affecting global finance, politics, and economy.

news.headline: Amazon delivery drivers at seven hubs are on strike, impacting operations minimally as some drivers walk out.
news.summary: The retail giant announced that it anticipates minimal disruption to its operations despite a strike by a portion of drivers employed by third-party firms that Amazon contracts with for delivery services.

news.headline: Kansas City Fed Composite Index Actual -4 (Forecast -1, Previous -2)
View Trump's risk during shutdown along with Musk's sway on Bloomberg.
Equities fear post-Fed limited in near term as volatility futures show. #StockMarket #Fed #Volatility
Danielle W. Barnes appointed to Truxton Trust Company's Board of Directors.
news.summary: Truxton Trust Company is delighted to share the addition of Danielle W. Barnes to its Board of Directors.

news.headline: New 'MemeBattle' Pixelverse game showcases Base's Brett and top meme mascots in deck-builder game. #crypto #gaming
news.summary: Pixelverse's MemeBattle deck-builder game will showcase famous meme coin mascots from Base and other blockchain networks.
